real_estate_agent.label: Real Estate Agent
hero_angles: Get more listings with a professional web presence
Stand out in a crowded SFV market
Convert more referrals with a site that closes for you
pain_points: Losing listings to agents with polished sites
Referrals can't find them online
No digital credibility vs. national brands

home_inspector.label: Home Inspector
hero_angles: Fill your inspection calendar year-round
Get found by agents searching for reliable inspectors
Turn your 5-star reputation into inbound leads
pain_points: Relies 100% on agent referrals
No way to capture direct buyer leads
Invisible online despite great word-of-mouth

general_contractor.label: General Contractor
hero_angles: Stop chasing jobs — let homeowners find you
Showcase your renovations and win more bids
A site that sells your work 24/7
pain_points: Jobs dry up between word-of-mouth referrals
No portfolio online
Losing bids to contractors with professional sites

moving_company.label: Moving Company
hero_angles: Book more local moves without paying Yelp
Own the 'Woodland Hills movers' search result
Convert more calls with a site that builds trust fast
pain_points: Paying high Yelp/Google lead fees
Competing with national brands
Seasonal revenue gaps

home_stager.label: Home Stager
hero_angles: Show agents what you can do before they ask
Your staging work deserves a gallery that sells
Win more staging contracts with a visual brand
pain_points: Portfolio lives only on Instagram
Agents don't know they exist
No way to capture direct inquiries

mortgage_broker.label: Mortgage Broker
hero_angles: Capture buyer leads before the listing agent does
Position yourself as the trusted local loan expert
A site that pre-qualifies clients while you sleep
pain_points: Invisible to buyers searching online
Competing with big bank advertising
No consistent inbound pipeline

title_company.label: Title Company
hero_angles: Make it easy for agents to choose you
Build trust before the first transaction
A modern site that matches your service quality
pain_points: Website looks like it hasn't been updated in 10 years
Agents choose the familiar name, not the best service
No online presence beyond a Google listing

property_manager.label: Property Manager
hero_angles: Attract investor clients searching for PM help online
Show landlords why you're the right choice
Stop losing clients to property management franchises
pain_points: No way to showcase portfolio of managed properties
Landlords find big PM firms first on Google
Hard to differentiate from competitors

real_estate_photographer.label: Real Estate Photographer
hero_angles: Win more listing shoots with a portfolio that wows agents
Let your photos sell your photography
Get booked direct instead of through referral only
pain_points: Portfolio scattered across MLS and Instagram
No dedicated booking system
Agents don't know rates upfront

interior_designer.label: Interior Designer
hero_angles: Turn your design portfolio into a client magnet
Capture homeowners remodeling after a sale
Partner with real estate agents through your own platform
pain_points: Work isn't visible outside Houzz or Instagram
No way to capture leads from real estate transitions
Competing with large design firms online
